data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. IMPERMISSIBLE could only manage to finish ninth at her latest appearance over 2040m at this track, failing to live up to market expectations. Meets a comparable field and she is capable of a much better performance. 4. B MAC C turned in another strong performance last start when he battled on bravely to finish second over 1660m at Albion Park. Primary contender based on those recent efforts. 7. HARPERVILLE deserves consideration after her last-start fourth when resuming over 2040m at this track a week ago. 10. MY ULTIMATE BUDDHA found form and finished in the money two runs ago then came back to earth when he broke and finished fifth last start over 1780m at this track, coming home 11 metres from the winner. Will need an ounce of luck to slot in from this tricky draw. Only needs to get things right to be in the money.","runners":[6,4,7,10],"exclusive":false}
